title: equisetum brasiliense var. nudum
intro: Equisetum brasiliense var. nudum is a variety of the Equisetum brasiliense plant, commonly known as the Brazilian horsetail or naked scurvy grass, which belongs to the Equisetum genus of plants. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections and kidney stones due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum brasiliense var. nudum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Equisetum brasiliense var. nudum can be prepared as a tea by infusing its stems in hot water, or used in herbal capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
